steps: A prime number is a natural number greater than 1 that has no positive divisors other than 1 and itself. Check each option: A) 9 = 3 × 3, not prime. B) 15 = 3 × 5, not prime. C) 11 is only divisible by 1 and 11, so it is prime. D) 21 = 3 × 7, not prime. E) 25 = 5 × 5, not prime. Only option C is prime.
